scripts.dev:workers: npm run validate:env -- --backend-only --kalshi && concurrently -k -n poly:events,kalshi:events,poly:live,kalshi:live,poly:history,kalshi:history,maintenance -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red,gray "npm run worker:poly:events -w backend" "npm run worker:kalshi:events -w backend" "npm run worker:poly:live -w backend" "npm run worker:kalshi:live -w backend" "npm run worker:poly:history -w backend" "npm run worker:kalshi:history -w backend" "npm run worker:maintenance -w backend"
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run validate:env -- --frontend-only && npm run dev -w frontend
